mapper.select:
select r.id, r.report_type, r.report_reporter_id, r.created_datetime, u.user_name, u.user_email from tbl_report r left join tbl_user u on r.report_reporter_id = u.id
order by r.id desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select ri.report_id, ri.item_id, ri.report_reason, ri.report_content, i.item_name, s.store_name from tbl_report_item ri left join tbl_item i on ri.item_id = i.id left join tbl_store s on i.item_store_id = s.id where ri.report_id = #{reportId}
select ru.report_id, ru.user_id , ru.report_reason, ru.report_content, u.user_name, u.user_email from tbl_report_user ru left join tbl_user u on ru.user_id = u.id where ru.report_id = #{reportId}
select rm.report_id, rm.market_id, rm.report_state, m.market_name, m.market_region from tbl_report_market rm left join tbl_market m on rm.market_id = m.id where rm.report_id = #{reportId}
select rs.report_id, rs.seller_id, rs.report_state, s.seller_name, s.seller_email from tbl_report_seller rs left join tbl_seller s on rs.seller_id = s.id where rs.report_id = #{reportId}
